summary: P14 fullProjectDeployable conclusion is retracted. Deployment feedback proves the system is still not understandable or usable enough for ordinary users: ordinary members can land in platform-oriented views, system member onboarding exposes the platform-account/member split, logout/pagination/new-create UX is incomplete, and page layout is still too engineering-driven.

issues.summary: PM accepted P14 despite deployed ordinary-user usability failure.
Pages remain admin/API-module oriented instead of task-oriented for ordinary users.
A system member account can still feel like it enters platform space instead of its business system runtime.
issues.evidence: User feedback: che account login still sees platform system

issues.summary: System member onboarding requires users to understand platform account first, then bind into a system.
issues.evidence: User feedback: must create platform account then add it to car system

issues.summary: Logout, pagination and new-create interaction are not at normal business-system quality.
issues.evidence: User feedback on logout, pagination and header-form creation

requiredBeforePackage: Run real browser script with platform_admin creating car system and che ordinary user using vehicle module
Verify che cannot see platform management, modeling, field design, publish or permission pages
Verify logout, pagination and task-oriented create entry on key pages
